# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

Prevent cloud monitoring.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: network
    type: compute.v1.network
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-network
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true

  - name: subnetwork
    type: compute.v1.subnetwork
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-subnetwork
      network: $(ref. network.selfLink)
      region: us-central1

  - name: instance-group-manager
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-igm
      baseInstanceName: ${project-id}-instance
      targetSize: 1
      zone: us-central1-a

  - name: instance-template
    type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-template
      properties:
        machineType: f1-micro
        disks:
          - deviceName: boot
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-9-stretch-v20201202
        networkInterfaces:
          - accessConfig:
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
            network: $(ref. network.selfLink)

  - name: instance-group
    type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-group
      zone: us-central1-a

  - name: backend-service
    type: compute.v1.backendService
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-backend-service
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref. health-check.selfLink)
      portName: http

  - name: target-pool
    type: compute.v1.targetPool
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-target-pool
      instanceGroupRef:
        member: $(ref. instance-group.selfLink)

  - name: health-check
    type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-health-check
      requestPath: /
      port: 80

  - name: load-balancer-forwarding-rule
    type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-forwarding-rule
      target: $(ref. backend-service.selfLink)
      portRange: 80-80

  - name: load-balancer-target-http-proxy
    type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-target-http-proxy
      urlMap: $(ref. url-map.selfLink)

  - name: url-map
    type: compute.v1.urlMap
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref. backend-service.selfLink)
      hostRules:
        - service: $(ref. backend-service.selfLink)
          servicePort: 80

  - name: sql-instance
    type: sqladmin.v1.instance
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-sql-instance
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_11
      region: us-central1

  - name: sql-database
    type: sqladmin.v1.database
    properties:
      instance: $(ref. sql-instance.selfLink)
      name: ${project-id}-database
      charset: UTF8
      collation: utf8_general_ci

  - name: bucket
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: ${project-id}-bucket
